instruction: A playlist item, visually appearing as a rectangular area within a list in the "Your Library" section. This item is labeled "Liked Songs" in a clear, readable font. It will likely be situated near the top of the playlist list within "Your Library," or potentially after any recently played or automatically generated playlist sections. The playlist item may also feature associated visual elements, such as a small album art thumbnail or a heart icon to indicate its "liked" status, positioned either to the left or above the text label. The background of the item might be a slightly different shade than the overall library background to indicate that it is a selectable item.

element.label: The 'Liked Songs' playlist item located in the 'Your Library' section, displaying a heart icon and the text 'Liked Songs'. It is positioned to the right of the album art thumbnail
